content.text: Review playwrigth docs and give a tutorial on how to write simple scrapper on https://news.ycombinator.com/news

content.thinking:

We can use scrape-playwright-docs-tool? That tool fetches Playwright docs. But maybe not needed. We can provide general instructions.

We need to review playwrigth docs? Probably means Playwright docs. But maybe they want a tutorial referencing docs. We'll write tutorial.

Also mention the Playwright test runner? But it's just simple script.

Also mention using playwright-core vs full.
